name: Payment Method Settings
body: [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Payment methods have a number of common settings that alter the way they display and their functionality. To edit\u00a0your payment method settings:"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In your\u00a0Neto by Maropost control panel navigate to "}, {"text": "Settings & Tools", "bold": true}, {"text": " > "}, {"text": "Payment Methods", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click the "}, {"text": "Configure", "bold": true}, {"text": " button next to the payment method you want to edit."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Modify your payment method settings to suit your needs, as per the table below:"}]}, {"type": "table", "children": [{"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "th", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Setting Name"}]}]}, {"type": "th", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Description"}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Sort Order"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Customise the order of your accepted payment methods on the checkout page by entering a number. Methods with a higher number will appear higher in the list."}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Display Name"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The name of the payment method that your customers will see in checkout."}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Checkout Description"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Extra details about your payment method (such as direct deposit information or surcharges)."}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Active/Enabled"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Toggle this setting to turn your payment methods on and off."}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Show on website"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Toggle this setting to make this payment method visible on your website. When off, the payment method can still be used in your control panel."}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Allow customers to save their cards for future purchases"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Available on some credit card gateways, this stores a token that allows further payments to be taken if authorised by your customer."}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Currency"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The currency the payment method operates in."}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Surcharge"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "An additional percentage increase (passed on to the customer) for using this payment method. Ensure you comply with "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://www.accc.gov.au/consumers/prices-surcharges-receipts/credit-debit-prepaid-card-surcharges", "children": [{"text": "applicable laws"}]}, {"text": " regarding surcharges."}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Min Spend"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Hides the payment method if the order amount is less than the min spend amount."}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Max Spend"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Hides the payment method if the order amount is more than the max spend amount."}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "User Groups"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "You can toggle the visibility for each payment method on a user group basis. Useful to show special payment methods (e.g. cheque, direct deposit) to wholesale or VIP customers (requires the "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/693-customer-groups", "children": [{"text": "customer groups"}]}, {"text": " add-on)."}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "eBay Payment Mapping"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Payment Methods can be mapped to a specific eBay Payment Method. See "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/779-ebay-payment-methods", "children": [{"text": "this article"}]}, {"text": " for more information."}]}]}]}], "id": "rich-table-943dd4fa"}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click the "}, {"text": "Save", "bold": true}, {"text": " button to confirm your changes."}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "We recommend testing your checkout page to ensure it functions as you're expecting."}]}]
